content:
Delhi ✈️ Mumbai ❤️

Ek chhota sa trip... lekin dher saari yaadein! 😊

BB Sir ke House Warming par jana hua, aur sach kahun toh bahut hi accha laga. Itne saare amazing co-faculties se milna, baatein karna, hasi-mazaak, aur saath mein quality time spend karna... pura din yaadgaar ban gaya. ❤️

Ravi Taori Sir, Sankalp Kanstiya Sir, Manish Sir (MV), Paridhi Ma'am, Vishal Bhattad Sir, Gurpreet Singh Sir, Sanjay appan sir, siddhesh walimbe sir, Arjun Chhabra sir aur Yashwant Mangal Sir... aapse milkar bahut accha laga. 🤗

Dil se thank you BB Sir itne pyaar se bulane aur itni warm hospitality ke liye. Aapne is din ko aur bhi special bana diya. 🙏

Kabhi-kabhi aise chhote get-togethers hi sabse khoobsurat memories de jaate hain. ✨

Mumbai, phir milenge! ❤️

SONALI JAIN (Theory Queen)


hashtag
#DelhiToMumbai
